extra.auto.1_came_for_the_views_and_they: "Came for the views and they exceeded expectations. Ortaköy Mosque glowing, Dolmabahçe lit up, the bridge turning red — some of my best Istanbul night shots."
extra.auto.2_istanbul_da_ya_yorum_ama_il: "Istanbul'da yaşıyorum ama ilk kez böyle bir tur denedim. Yurtdışından gelen misafirlerimle gittik, hepsi çok beğendi. Profesyonel bir organizasyon."
extra.auto.3_our_anniversary_dinner_was_: "Our anniversary dinner was unforgettable. Candle-lit mezes, attentive service, the Bosphorus in the background — every bite felt special."
extra.auto.4_the_belly_dance_performance: "The belly dance performance was incredible. The dancer commanded the whole room — pure artistry. I was on a solo trip and felt welcomed the entire evening."
extra.auto.8_21_00_3_hours_full_dinner_t: (21:00, 3 hours — full dinner, Turkish night show with Whirling Dervish, belly dance, folk dances, live music and DJ, plus stunning night views). Departs from Kabataş Pier.
extra.auto.9_15_person_wine_beer_rak_vod: +€15/person · Wine, beer, rakı, vodka, or gin
extra.auto.10_30_person_wine_beer_rak_vo: +€30/person · Wine, beer, rakı, vodka, gin all night
extra.auto.12_0_3_age_free_4_8_age_50_of: 0-3 age: Free | 4-8 age: 50% off | 9+ age: Full price
extra.auto.33_all_guests_are_dropped_off: All guests are dropped off at
extra.auto.34_celebrating_something_spec: Celebrating something special? We offer romantic table setup with candles & flowers (+€15) and birthday celebrations. Tell us!
extra.auto.41_if_you_selected_hotel_tran: If you selected hotel transfer, please be ready at your hotel lobby by
extra.auto.43_live_singer_performances_t: Live singer performances, traditional Turkish night show with folk dances, belly dance, and DJ music. Entertainment runs until 21:00.
extra.auto.45_no_prepayment_is_required_: No prepayment is required. You pay directly on the boat before or during the cruise. We accept cash (EUR, TRY, USD) and credit cards.
extra.auto.56_the_meeting_point_depends_: The meeting point depends on which cruise you book. After your reservation is confirmed, we'll send you the exact location with a Google Maps pin on WhatsApp, along with clear directions.
extra.auto.68_warm_appetizer_crispy_past: Warm appetizer: crispy pastry rolls with cured beef & cheese
extra.auto.74_yes_hotel_transfer_is_avai: Yes! Hotel transfer is available for +€10 per person, including pickup and drop-off. Service areas: Beşiktaş, Sütlüce, Sirkeci, Topkapı, Taksim, Eminönü, Kağıthane, Fatih, Laleli, Sultanahmet, Ortaköy and Beyoğlu.
extra.auto.75_yes_same_day_bookings_are_: Yes! Same-day bookings are available until 20:00 (1 hour before departure). Just message us and we'll check availability instantly.
extra.auto.76_yes_free_cancellation_is_a: Yes. Free cancellation is available up to 2 hours before the cruise (until 19:00). After that, please let us know on WhatsApp so we can assist you. Since there's no prepayment, the process is hassle-free.
extra.auto.77_between_23_30_and_00_00_if: between 23:30 and 00:00. If you booked hotel transfer, the same driver who picked you up will be waiting at the pier to take you back to your hotel.
extra.auto.78_it_can_get_cool_on_deck: it can get cool on deck
extra.auto.81_pay_on_the_boat_cash_or_ca: — pay on the boat (cash or card)
